mapper.sql: pos.position_key, pos.position_title, pos.sort_index, pos.reg_date, pos.mod_date, pos.reg_user_key, pos.mod_user_key
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM common_position pos WHERE 1=1
AND pos.position_title LIKE '%' || #{positionTitle} || '%'
ORDER BY pos.sort_index ASC, pos.position_title ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_position (position_key, position_title, sort_index, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{positionKey}, #{positionTitle}, #{sortIndex}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{regUserKey})
